name: TextField
description: Text fields let operators enter and edit text — a registration number, a driver's name, an odometer reading, a note. They come in filled and outlined styles and always carry a label so the field's purpose stays visible once filled.
keyRule: Pick one style and use it consistently across a form. In the Cartrack portal, outlined is the default for forms; filled suits dense, list-like settings.

variants.name: Filled
variants.whenToUse: Dense, settings-style lists; strong visual grouping.

variants.name: Outlined
variants.whenToUse: Default for forms; clear field boundaries.

variants.name: With adornments
variants.whenToUse: Search (leading magnifier + trailing clear), password (visibility toggle), units (trailing "km").

variants.name: Select / dropdown field
variants.whenToUse: A field that opens a menu to choose one value.

anatomy.name: Container
anatomy.description: filled (shaded box, bottom line) or outlined (border box).

anatomy.name: Label
anatomy.description: floats above the value; stays visible when filled.

anatomy.name: Supporting text
anatomy.description: helper or error message below the field.

anatomy.name: Activation line / border
anatomy.description: turns primary on focus, error on invalid.

behaviors.name: Label float
behaviors.description: The label sits in the field when empty and floats up on focus or when a value is present, so it never hides the content.

behaviors.name: Validation
behaviors.description: Validate on blur or submit; show a concise error in the supporting text and turn the field's line/border to the error colour. Keep the label.

behaviors.name: Read-only & disabled
behaviors.description: Read-only shows a value that can't be edited but can be copied; disabled dims the whole field and removes it from tab order.

states.treatment: Primary 2px border (outlined) or 2px underline (filled); primary label.
Error colour border/line, label, and supporting text.

specs.value: primary-dark (#BB4800) / error (#F44336) — primary-dark keeps the focus line legible on white

props.name: variant
props.description: Filled suits dense, settings-style lists; outlined is the Cartrack portal's default for forms.

props.name: label
props.description: Always shown; keeps the field's purpose visible once filled.

props.name: value
props.description: The value the operator has typed.

props.name: helperText
props.description: Helper text below the field; replaced by the error message when error is set.

props.name: error
props.description: Concise, specific error text; also flips the field into the error state.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Dims the whole field and removes it from tab order.

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Shows a value that can't be edited but can be copied.

props.name: type
props.description: Underlying input type for single-line fields; ignored when multiline is true.

props.name: leadingIcon
props.description: Leading FontAwesome icon name (see Icon.doc.json), e.g. "search".

props.name: trailingIcon
props.description: Trailing FontAwesome icon name, e.g. "times" (clear) or a unit like "km".

props.name: multiline
props.description: Renders a textarea that grows with content instead of a single-line input.

props.name: rows
props.description: Textarea row count when multiline is true.

doThis: Always show a label; keep it visible when filled.
Write specific, helpful error text ("Enter a value", not "Invalid").
Use one field style per form.
Right-size width to the expected content.
dontDoThis: Don't use placeholder text as the only label.
Don't mix filled and outlined in the same form.
Don't rely on colour alone for errors — include text.
accessibility: Every field has a programmatic <label>; errors are linked via aria-describedby and announced.
Required and invalid states use aria-required / aria-invalid, not colour alone.

related.name: Picker
related.why: Dates and times pick better than they type

related.name: Slider
related.why: Approximate values within a visible range

related.name: Icon
related.why: leadingIcon/trailingIcon take a registered FontAwesome name, not a Material ligature
